# Domus Brickell Center

### **Brickell / 2028**

35 Stories / 579 Residences of
Studios, 1 & 2 Bedrooms

**1034 SW 2nd Ave, Miami, FL 33130, USA**

Average Price: $1,500 x SF ($16,146 x M2)

Domus Brickell Center is a modern residential building with short term rentals. It features an impressive design with glass balconies, and a gray accent with an irregular rectangle pattern. This innovative condo designed by MC+G Architecture offers 579 residences ranging from studios to 2 bedrooms. Enjoy a spacious residence with spectacular pleasant views of the luxurious Brickell and Downtown buildings and the entire Miami skyline. Amenities at Domus Brickell Center include an amazing rooftop with pool, social lounge, bar, barbecue area and more.

This project is currently in under construction and prices start at $520,000. Please [contact us](https://miamiresidential.com/domusbrickellcenter/#contactform) for more information.

CONDOS FOR SALE

CONDOS FOR RENT

CONDOS SOLD/RENTED

Developed by North Development

Website: [https://DomusBrickellCenter.miami/](https://domusbrickellcenter.miami/)

This project is currently in under construction and prices start at $520,000. Please [contact us](https://miamiresidential.com/domusbrickellcenter/#contactform) for more information.

## Features

### Building Features

- Signature Domus Lobby Lounge: The Cypress Room
- Surround-sound speakers with ambient music
- Pet friendly
- Wind impact-resistant windows
- EV charging stations
- Domus Bike Share
- Filtered AC in all common areas
- Café featuring a barista and baked goods
- Wine bar with covered terrace
- Artisanal market offering gourmet fare
- Lush garden lounge
- Gym with state-of-the-art equipment
- Rooftop pool and sky deck
- Cabanas with daybeds
- Hot tub
- Rooftop yoga deck
- Rooftop bar
- Ample co-working space
- Conference meeting room

### Residence Features

- Studio, one- and two-bedroom FLATS
- 9+ foot ceilings in all FLATS
- Delivered fully finished and furnished with hard flooring throughout
- Private balcony in all FLATS
- Keyless entry smart lock system
- Kitchen equipped with premium Bosch appliance package
- Modern fixtures
- Stone countertops
- Washer and dryer
- UV filtered water in all FLATS

![](https://miamiresidential.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/02/18-Domus-Brickell-Center-Pool.jpg)

## Developers

![](https://miamiresidential.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/05/Developer-Domus-Brickell-Center.jpg)

North Development is a joint venture made up of two entities: Edifica from Peru and Oak capital from Miami. With the combined experience of over 100 projects, their company has a mission of being recognized as a leading real estate developer with an internationally recognized brand; they offer specialization in the ground-up development of high-rise short-term rental buildings that maximize value for investors and create comfortable experiences for guests.

## Latest News

![](https://miamiresidential.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/01/91-MR.jpg)

### Domus Brickell Center (2028) is now asking for only 30%

This recently launched short-term rental residential project will soon begin construction, still has good opportunities for studios up to 2 bedrooms, is located in front of Mercedes Benz, and only asks for 30% in initial deposits… great opportunity.

Updated on: 01/22/2025

### Studios, One and Two Bedroom Configurations

## The Residences

All Luxury condos in Domus Brickell Center include Spacious Floor Plans, 9+ Foot Ceilings, Wind Impact-Resistant Windows, Balconies, Sleek Kitchen Cabinets, Stainless Steel Kitchen Appliances, UV filtered water and more! Enjoy spectacular views of the luxurious Brickell and Downtown buildings and the entire Miami skyline.

### Spectacular Common Areas

## Luxury Amenities

Domus Brickell Center offers unique amenities to cater its residents' needs, such as a Rooftop Pool, Bar, Grill Area, Lounge, 1,545 Square Feet Ground Floor Food and Beverage, Expansive Lobby with approximately 4,000 sf of gathering Space, Surround Sound Speakers With Ambient Music, Pet Friendly Building, EV Charging Stations, Domus bike share, Specialized air filtration system in all common areasand more...

## Video of Domus Brickell Center

[![](https://domusbrickellcenter.miami/assets/images/image11.jpg?v=ad24b0e2)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=CWnKYNgVBnA)

## THE TEAM

## NORTH DEVELOPMENT

North Development is a joint venture made up of two entities: Edifica from Peru and Oak capital from Miami. With the combined experience of over 100 projects, their company has a mission of being recognized as a leading real estate developer with an internationally recognized brand; they offer specialization in the ground-up development of high-rise short-term rental buildings that maximize value for investors and create comfortable experiences for guests.

## Studio Mc+G Architecture

Positive creativity drives their design of spaces and objects they love crafting. Studio MC+G designers grasp clients' needs and the building's role in fostering creativity, culture, prosperity, and urban vitality. They prioritize resource efficiency in both their operations and designs.

![](https://domusbrickellcenter.miami/assets/images/image10.jpg?v=ad24b0e2)

## THE LOCATION

Building Address:

[1034 SW 2nd Ave, Miami, FL 33130](https://maps.app.goo.gl/ExyGND5G5naaWzf29)

## Invest in Miami

Investing in an apartment in Miami offers unparalleled benefits, from enjoying a year-round tropical climate to tapping into a booming real estate market with excellent appreciation potential. Miami's vibrant cultural scene, world-class amenities, and thriving economy make it a prime location for both living and investment. By choosing to buy with us, you gain access to our extensive market expertise, personalized service, and a curated selection of premium properties tailored to your needs. Our commitment to excellence ensures a seamless buying experience, guiding you every step of the way to secure an apartment that not only meets your lifestyle desires but also serves as a valuable investment for the future.
